description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a metallic crown cap. The front label is cream-colored with dark, stylized text and a line drawing of a person sitting on a barrel, giving it a vintage, artisanal appearance. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with the back and sides of the bottle left unadorned, showing the translucent brown glass. The bottle is slender and tapers smoothly from the body to the neck, typical of standard beer bottles. The cap is metallic with a gold tone and crimped edges, securely sealing the contents. The overall look is classic and would be commonly found in urban settings such as bars, restaurants, or outdoor events.
description: A classic brown glass beer bottle with a cream label featuring dark text and a line drawing, sealed with a gold crown cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream label with dark text and a line drawing, as well as the gold crown cap.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view revealing the side of the label and the mostly unadorned brown glass surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown glass with no visible label or markings.
description_view_3: Three-quarter front view showing the edge of the label and the transition from label to bare glass.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a cream background with dark, stylized serif text and a hand-drawn illustration of a person sitting on a barrel. The design is minimalistic and vintage, with a focus on line art and classic typography.
